title: order create 502 with misleading db lock signals
symptom: 2026-03-10 10:07 起 POST /api/v1/orders 大量 502/504，热点 sku_10017 下单 RT 从 300ms 升至 12s+，库存预占偶发成功但订单创建失败；数据库锁等待、Top SQL 与连接池告警同时出现，容易误判为数据库根因。
log_excerpt:
2026-03-10T10:08:09.944+08:00 WARN  [order-service] promotionClient.checkQuota cost=1847ms sku=sku_10017 traceId=8fa1a2
2026-03-10T10:08:10.118+08:00 WARN  [order-service] inventory reservation update waiting lock sku=sku_10017 txId=7812231
2026-03-10T10:08:11.203+08:00 ERROR [order-service] HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 3000ms
2026-03-10T10:08:11.205+08:00 ERROR [order-service] CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection
2026-03-10T10:08:12.301+08:00 ERROR [gateway] upstream request timeout service=order-service path=/api/v1/orders status=502
DB wait summary: row lock wait count 15/min -> 2200/min, top sql=update inventory_reservation set reserved = reserved + ? where sku_id = ?; explain remains on idx_inventory_reservation_sku_id; promotion-service p95 80ms -> 1.8s
stacktrace:
org.springframework.jdbc.CannotGetJdbcConnectionException: Failed to obtain JDBC Connection
	at org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceUtils.getConnection(DataSourceUtils.java:81)
	at com.acme.order.repository.InventoryReservationRepository.reserve(InventoryReservationRepository.java:57)
Caused by: java.sql.SQLTransientConnectionException: HikariPool-1 - Connection is not available, request timed out after 3000ms
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.createTimeoutException(HikariPool.java:696)
	at com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.getConnection(HikariPool.java:181)
expected_root_cause: 发布变更把 promotionClient.checkQuota 远程调用放进下单事务内，导致事务边界过长、连接持有时间增加；热点 SKU 下数据库锁等待被放大，最终触发连接池耗尽与 502。
expected_causal_chain: 代码变更把远程促销校验放进事务
事务持有连接与锁时间变长
热点 sku_10017 触发 inventory_reservation 行锁等待放大
HikariPool 活跃连接打满并出现获取超时
order-service RT 激增并由 gateway 返回 502/504
must_include: 主因是代码级事务边界错误或远程调用进入事务
数据库锁等待是放大器而不是原发根因
需要明确连接池耗尽是结果不是起点
must_exclude: 数据库热点锁竞争是唯一主因
索引失效或全表扫描是主因
仅把连接池配置过小当成主因
distractor_root_causes: inventory_reservation 热点行锁就是根因
数据库索引失效导致慢 SQL
流量突增导致连接池容量不足
